One Two

A heading rendered light and serif

This paragraph carries enough plain body text to establish a dominant sampled font family and a dominant computed text colour across the fixture page as a whole.

More filler prose follows here so that the sampled text comfortably clears the minimum character threshold that the conservative style engine requires before it speaks.

The third paragraph keeps the dominant share of the grey colour and the serif family well above the sixty percent dominance line used by the engine.

Low contrast text inside this section.

Footer text for the fixture page, long enough to be sampled.
